mano_cua.result_summary: ng-placeholder-tmp自定义占位符模板bug：选择选项后占位符未隐藏，同时显示placeholder'🇱🇹Select your city'和选中值'🇱🇹 Vilnius'。Fixed Placeholder页面行为正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Custom placeholder template (ng-placeholder-tmp) section shows both placeholder and selected value simultaneously after selection. The placeholder should be hidden when a value is selected but it persists alongside the selected value. Fixed Placeholder section works correctly - shows only selected value after selection.
